title: deathcords
description: A Minecraft mod which will help you to get cords where you dead recently
body:
# ☠️ Death Coordinates

Never lose your items again! **Death Coordinates** automatically records the exact location where you died and lets you retrieve it instantly with a simple command.

---

## ✨ Features

- 📍 **Automatic tracking** — coordinates are saved the moment you die
- 💬 **Clickable coords** — click the coordinates in chat to copy the `/tp` command instantly
- 📜 **Death history** — view all your deaths from the current session
- 🧹 **Clear history** — wipe your death log whenever you want
- 🔧 **OP support** — operators can check any player's death location
- 🌍 **Dimension aware** — tracks which dimension you died in (Overworld, Nether, End)

---

## 📋 Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/deathcoords` or `/dc` | Show your last death location |
| `/deathcoords history` | Show all recorded deaths this session |
| `/deathcoords clear` | Clear your death history |
| `/deathcoords player <name>` | **[OP]** Check another player's death |
| `/deathcoords help` | Show help menu |

---

## 🔧 Requirements

- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) 0.18.4+
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- Minecraft **1.21.8** or **1.21.11**

---

## 🖥️ Server-side mod
> Works on any server — players **do not** need to install this mod on their client!

---

*Made with ❤️ — Never lose your stuff again!*
